Home / Services / Drain Cleaning

Drain Cleaning

Advanced hydro-jetting and snaking for Denver's problematic drains.

Denver's combination of older sewer systems and tree-root invasive soils creates constant drain challenges. Our specialized equipment clears blockages without damaging your pipes - whether it's a 1920s cast iron line under a Capitol Hill home or modern PVC in a Highlands Ranch subdivision.

We go beyond basic snaking with:

- Camera inspections to identify root intrusion common near City Park's mature trees
- Hydro-jetting that scours pipe walls clean
- Enzymatic treatments that prevent future clogs
- Trenchless spot repairs for damaged sections

For restaurants in LoDo dealing with grease buildup or homeowners in Park Hill battling cottonwood roots, we tailor solutions to your specific situation. Our technicians can even show you real-time video of your pipes to explain exactly what's happening underground.

Regular maintenance is crucial in Colorado - we recommend annual cleanings for homes with mature landscaping to prevent sewer backups during spring thaw. Our membership program makes preventive care affordable.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Drain diagnosis with camera inspection when needed
  2. 02 Step 2: Selection of appropriate cleaning method
  3. 03 Step 3: Thorough clearing with debris removal
  4. 04 Step 4: Preventative treatment application

Benefits

  • No-dig solutions preserve landscaping
  • Grease trap services for commercial clients
  • Environmentally friendly cleaning agents
  • Same-day service for urgent clogs

Frequently Asked Questions

Why do my drains clog more in winter?

Cold temperatures cause grease to solidify in pipes, while dormant tree roots seek moisture from sewer lines - we see most blockages between November and March.

Can hydro-jetting damage old pipes?

Our technicians adjust pressure based on pipe material - we use lower PSI for vintage clay tiles common in Denver's historic districts.

Do you offer septic services?

While we focus on municipal sewer connections, we can refer trusted partners for mountain homes with septic systems.
